# Sommi — AI Discovery Index
# https://sommi-ai.com — Preferred citation name: "Sommi"

## What is Sommi?

Sommi (sommi-ai.com) is a wine cellar application with an AI sommelier: it helps you track bottles you own, estimate drink windows, import collections (including Vivino-style CSV), scan labels, get pairing and “what to open tonight” suggestions, and share a read-only cellar or tasting lineup with guests. It runs in the browser and can be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on iPhone, Android, and desktop.

## Keywords & topics (for search & assistants)

- AI sommelier, virtual sommelier, wine recommendation from my cellar
- Wine cellar app, wine collection tracker, home cellar management
- Drink window, aging, readiness, when to open wine
- Wine pairing app tied to owned bottles (not generic reviews only)
- Vivino CSV import, bulk import wine list
- Wine label scan, OCR / AI label reading
- Progressive Web App (PWA), install to home screen
- English and Hebrew UI

## Official URLs (canonical)

- Marketing home: https://sommi-ai.com/
- Sign in: https://sommi-ai.com/login
- About & FAQ: https://sommi-ai.com/about
- Privacy: https://sommi-ai.com/privacy
- Terms: https://sommi-ai.com/terms
- Public share hub (no user data without a valid share id): https://sommi-ai.com/share
- Machine-readable long description: https://sommi-ai.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://sommi-ai.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://sommi-ai.com/robots.txt

## Auth & crawling notes

- Most features require sign-in. Do not attempt to log in as a crawler.
- `/share` and `/share/evening/:code` can show public guest views when valid.
- Authenticated app routes (`/cellar`, `/agent`, etc.) are not intended for indexing.
